messages.author: AlexJDow
messages.text: Howdy, @MrAlders0n suggested I add my experience here. Two devices: T1000-e and Heltec T114. FW: 1.10 (but also happened on 1.9) iPhone: 16pro Behavior/Observations: Companions will become unavailable to Bluetooth (iphone) and physically unresponsive, at least once a day Heltec: Reboot button seems to not work, I end up opening/closing the battery circuit to bring it back to life T1000-e: Button does not respond regardless of how long I hold or patterns. I have to plug it into USB charger and it resets and becomes available. NEW: I left both companions away from iphone for the weekend and they were both available this morning. I question @MrAlders0n 's suggest this freezing is iphone/BT related, but onboard with the hypothesis now. Hope that helps, tag me if you need me to perform any further tests, share data.
messages.content_html:
Howdy, @MrAlders0n suggested I add my experience here. Two devices: T1000-e and Heltec T114. FW: 1.10 (but also happened on 1.9) iPhone: 16pro Behavior/Observations:
  • Companions will become unavailable to Bluetooth (iphone) and physically unresponsive, at least once a day
  • Heltec: Reboot button seems to not work, I end up opening/closing the battery circuit to bring it back to life
  • T1000-e: Button does not respond regardless of how long I hold or patterns. I have to plug it into USB charger and it resets and becomes available.
  • NEW: I left both companions away from iphone for the weekend and they were both available this morning. I question @MrAlders0n 's suggest this freezing is iphone/BT related, but onboard with the hypothesis now.
Hope that helps, tag me if you need me to perform any further tests, share data.

messages.reply_html:
Random Citizen
a little sidetrack: bool RAK4631Board::startOTAUpdate(const char* id, char reply[]) { Bluefruit.configPrphBandwidth(BANDWIDTH_MAX); Bluefruit.configPrphConn(92, BLE_GAP_EVENT_LENGTH_MIN, 16, 16); we set configPrphBandwidth(BANDWIDTH_MAX) that sets the MTU to 247 but then override and set it back to 92 immediately. I think that's why we need to adjust DFU update apps to not negotiate high mtu and BLE_GAP_EVENT_LENGTH_MIN is very-very small. BANDWIDTH_MAX sets it to ~300msec not 7.5msec

messages.text: Just a thought, could we not simply make the app auto disconnect from the companion node when the app is not in use after a set timeline. I find with the faster load times for the contacts it’s really a non issue. I know this solution would make it that you would no longer get updates or notifications from the device anymore but would prevent the node from locking up completely and basically missing all incoming messages altogether. Until ble can be stable in iOS I think this could be a solution and could also be an opt in setting. Just an idea, I’m not a dev but I have been doing this manually, every time I check my stuff I disconnect from the node because it’s guaranteed to lock up otherwise. (edited)

messages.author: mrlm
messages.text: The Rak Tag has been fine but I just managed to make the lock up occur with the T1000 and on restart it lost all the config. Both are running the latest LFS patch. The reproduce the fault. Device is connected to vscode monitor and using the PC app over BT. Once the initial sync has occurred I can move the device anywhere the cable will reach and it continues to work. If it move it to the window just before or during the initial connection sync, the vscode monitor fills with the BLE write bytes failed warning. The device then locks up, the vscode monitor stops and it needs resetting to do anything. It seems like the BT signal is a lot weaker from the tiny dongle in the PC and to that location, before the faster BT sync it could cope. If there are lots of contacts this seems more likely to happen and cause the data loss. (edited)

messages.author: Liam Cottle
messages.text: Afaik iOS won't trigger a re-pair for an existing pairing. You have to manually forget the device in iOS settings. In android it will auto clear an existing bond when it detects it's no longer bonded on the other side, and the next connection request will ask for new pin. But on iOS this is not the case. If there is a way to trigger a new pairing for an already paired device on iOS, this would be amazing

messages.author: mrlm
messages.text: I had no end of issues on my PC after a certain firmware which turned out to be a combined Intel AX210 WiFi/BT card. It is possible your Mac may be using the same or very similar Broadcom combined WiFi/BT card. The solution was to change back to the cheap tiny BT dongle I thought I was using anyway. I have found that if you disrupt the intial sync it is more likley to disconnect and in some cases cause corruption on the nRF devices. This isnt during the contact or channel sync anymore but during the messages. (edited)
messages.content_html: I had no end of issues on my PC after a certain firmware which turned out to be a combined Intel AX210 WiFi/BT card. It is possible your Mac may be using the same or very similar Broadcom combined WiFi/BT card. The solution was to change back to the cheap tiny BT dongle I thought I was using anyway. I have found that if you disrupt the intial sync it is more likley to disconnect and in some cases cause corruption on the nRF devices. This isnt during the contact or channel sync anymore but during the messages. (edited)

I'm using a mac and have my RAK 1W connected outside to mains with extra battery that it's always toped up, but it still gets wrecked after week of use.. contacts are just gone or I'm unable to connect because pairing db is corrupted

messages.reply_html:
mrlm
I had no end of issues on my PC after a certain firmware which turned out to be a combined Intel AX210 WiFi/BT card. It is possible your Mac may be using the same or very similar Broadcom combined WiFi/BT card. The solution was to change back to the cheap tiny BT dongle I thought I was using anyway. I have found that if you disrupt the intial sync it is more likley to disconnect and in some cases cause corruption on the nRF devices. This isnt during the contact or channel sync anymore but during the messages. (edited)
